_comentario: ⭐ TESTIMONIOS - Añade o edita opiniones de clientes aquí

testimonials.quote: Walking through Krakow with these stories in my ears was like traveling back in time. I could feel the resistance in every corner. Absolutely moving.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: The best way to understand a city. The gnome story in Wroclaw had me laughing and crying at the same time. These are stories that textbooks never tell.
testimonials.author: Thomas K.

testimonials.quote: I loved that 40% of profits go back to the elderly narrators. You're not just buying a tour, you're supporting a beautiful cause.
testimonials.author: María G.

testimonials.quote: As a history teacher, I recommend these tours to all my students visiting Poland. The personal stories make the Cold War era come alive.
testimonials.author: Prof. Anna W.

testimonials.quote: Four languages available! My family could all enjoy the tour together - each in their own language. Brilliant concept.
testimonials.author: Jürgen H.

testimonials.quote: The audio quality is superb and the GPS technology works perfectly. I forgot I was on a tour - it felt like the city itself was whispering its secrets to me.
testimonials.author: Claire D.
